channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Photo of JD Vance at Switzerland Talks Sparks Online Speculation Over Identification Card Visible in Laptop
item.description: A photograph shared on social media by Qatari Prime Minister Mohammed bin Abdulrahman bin Jassim Al Thani during diplomatic discussions in Switzerland generated widespread online speculation about an ...

item.title: Senate impeachment pre-trial reviews thousands of documents in case against Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: Ang ikalawang araw ng pre-trial proceedings sa impeachment case laban kay Vice President Sara Duterte ay nakatuon sa pagproseso ng napakaraming documentary evidence, lalo na para sa unang artikulo ng ...

item.title: Rick Scott Invites Trump to Senate GOP Lunch Amid Tensions With Majority Leader John Thune
item.description: President Donald Trump is expected to attend a Senate Republican Steering Committee lunch on Wednesday after being invited by Senator Rick Scott of Florida. According to the report, some Republican la...

item.title: Early Portraits of Cyndi Lauper During Her Blue Angel Years in 1980 Amsterdam
item.description: The article looks back at a 1980 portrait session featuring Cyndi Lauper in Amsterdam during her time as the lead singer of the band Blue Angel, several years before she became an international solo s...

item.title: Republican Critics Question Trump Administration's Iran Agreement Following Breakdown of Talks
item.description: A political discussion emerged after several Republican figures publicly criticized President Donald Trump's handling of negotiations and conflict-related policies involving Iran. According to comment...

item.title: Opinion Column Argues Trump's Public Behavior Reflects Isolation, Anger, and Personal Dissatisfaction
item.description: In this opinion article, journalist Ray Richmond argues that President Donald Trump's behavior during the 2026 G7 summit reflects a deeply unhappy and resentful personality. The author describes Trump...

item.title: Keir Starmer Resigns as UK Prime Minister, Endorses Successor Amid Labour Party Challenges
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced his resignation on Monday outside 10 Downing Street, ending his short tenure after less than two years in office. This decision comes after mounting press...

item.title: A Retrospective on France Anglade and Her Legacy in 1960s European Cinema
item.description: France Anglade (1942–2014) was a French actress who became one of the recognizable faces of European cinema during the 1960s. Known for her bright smile, natural beauty, and approachable screen presen...

item.title: PNP Says It Has Not Yet Received Any Official Arrest Warrant for Senator Rodante Marcoleta
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) said on Monday that it has not yet received any official communication regarding an alleged arrest warrant issued against Senator Rodante Marcoleta. During a press...

item.title: A Look at Judy Holliday’s Rise to Stardom Through 1940s Portrait Photography
item.description: This article from Vintage Everyday highlights a collection of 18 portraits of American actress, comedian, singer, and songwriter Judy Holliday taken during the 1940s, while also reviewing the key mile...

item.title: Apple Reportedly Targets 2027 Launch for AI-Focused Smart Glasses
item.description: Apple is reportedly preparing to enter the smart glasses market with a new wearable device that could launch in late 2027. According to reports cited in the article, including information attributed t...

item.title: Former GOP Strategist Argues Republican Party Has Fundamentally Changed Under Trump
item.description: A political commentary article highlighted the views of longtime Republican strategist Mike Madrid, who argued that the Republican Party has undergone a profound transformation during and after Donald...

item.title: Economist Warns Global Economy Faces Rising Risks Amid U.S.-Iran Tensions and Trade Disruptions
item.description: An economist has warned that escalating geopolitical tensions involving the United States and Iran could place additional strain on an already fragile global economy. During an appearance on the 'Cour...

item.title: The Unbuilt N1F and N1M: Soviet Super-Heavy Launch Vehicle Concepts Beyond the N1 Moon Rocket
item.description: This article examines the N1F and N1M, two advanced Soviet super-heavy rocket concepts that were intended to improve upon the N1 launch vehicle developed for the USSR’s crewed lunar program. The origi...

item.title: Two Dead and Several Injured After Fire Engulfs Gikomba Market in Nairobi
item.description: In a sad incident early Sunday morning, two people lost their lives and several others got minor injuries when a big fire broke out at Gikomba Market in Nairobi. This market is one of the largest trad...

item.title: Jeanine Pirro suggests possible prosecution over Reflecting Pool incident, prompting online criticism
item.description: U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine Pirro drew widespread criticism after suggesting during a Fox News interview that a journalist could face criminal charges related to a recent incide...

item.title: Trump Claims Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool Was Vandalized Following Inspection
item.description: President Donald Trump drew attention and criticism after commenting on the condition of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool in Washington, D.C. The pool has recently been the focus of a renovation e...

item.title: Analyst Says Iran Negotiations Have Weakened Trump's Position Amid Renewed Strait of Hormuz Tensions
item.description: According to the article, an agreement reached between the Trump administration and the Iranian government to reopen the Strait of Hormuz has quickly come under pressure. The Strait of Hormuz is descr...

item.title: Foreign Policy Expert Advises Trump to Allow Negotiators to Work on Iran Deal Without Interference
item.description: A foreign relations expert, Joseph Cirincione of the Council on Foreign Relations, offered direct advice to President Donald Trump amid deteriorating negotiations with Iran. Speaking on MS NOW's 'Alex...

item.title: Typhoon Francisco intensifies east of Central Luzon, enhances southwest monsoon rains across Philippines
item.description: Typhoon Francisco (international name Mekkhala) continued to strengthen on Sunday night, June 21, 2026, as it moved west-northwest over waters east of Central Luzon, according to the Philippine Atmosp...
